THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, CHESTERLAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1541 CALIFORNIA ST, ROOM 32, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION OF WRIT STAYED TILL 5PM 5/31/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFT TO PAY $300 P/M FOR APR & MAY 1998 BY MAKING $150- PAYMENTS ON 4/3, 4/17, 5/4 AND 5/18/98. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN COND'N. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES.
